alien_recommendation_card.primitive: safe vectorized execution / flattened contiguous F64Bits multiply loop
alien_recommendation_card.fallback: fall through to the generic binary_literal_op path for non-F64, malformed, or broadcasted tensors

lever.description: Fast path same-shape DType::F64 tensor multiply by iterating directly over paired F64Bits literals and revalidating the output shape through TensorValue::new.

after.tool: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'eval/mul_1k_f64_vec' --sample-size 40 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Output elements are produced in the same pairwise input order.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Each output bit is generated by the same scalar f64 multiplication expression used by the generic path, then stored with to_bits.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No comparisons or tie-breaking are introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No RNG state is read or written.
isomorphism_proof.errors: Only same-shape DType::F64 tensors with F64Bits elements take the fast path; malformed literal kinds return None and use the generic path.
